TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-frog_Talum
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: 'uvaaza hai ilumah at aupa musku(n)(ma)s isaicia tu asu.
S.PHON: ʔuvaaða x~χai il~ɬumax~χ at aupa musku(n)(ma)s isaiʨia tu asu.
S.FORM: 'uvaaza hai ilumah at aupa musku(n)(ma)s isaicia tu asu.
S.PHON: ʔuvaaða x~χai il~ɬumax~χ at aupa musku(n)(ma)s isaiʨia tu asu.
S.TRANSL: 一個孩子跟他的狗一起在家.
A child was at home with his dog.

S.FORM: at aiza sisiuh isian sia pan.
S.PHON: at aiða ɕiɕiux~χ iɕian ɕia pan.
S.FORM: at aiza sisiuh isian sia pan.
S.PHON: at aiða ɕiɕiux~χ iɕian ɕia pan.
S.TRANSL: 有青蛙在瓶子裡面.
There was frog inside a bottle .

S.FORM: a pahainanan naicia.
S.PHON: a pax~χainanan naiʨia.
S.FORM: a pahainanan naicia.
S.PHON: a pax~χainanan naiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他們玩那個青蛙.
They had fun with the frog.

S.FORM: naia hai mapasisivit at.
S.PHON: naia x~χai mapaɕiɕivit at.
S.FORM: naia hai mapasisivit at.
S.PHON: naia x~χai mapaɕiɕivit at.
S.TRANSL: 他們一直互相對看.
They watched each other.

S.FORM: masabahin 'uvaaza hai.
S.PHON: masabax~χin ʔuvaaða x~χai.
S.FORM: masabahin 'uvaaza hai.
S.PHON: masabax~χin ʔuvaaða x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 然後,那個孩子睡著了.
Then the child fell asleep.

S.FORM: maza sisiuh a hai munapav mataidaza munapav sia pancia.
S.PHON: maða ɕiɕiux~χ a x~χai munapav mataidaða munapav ɕia panʨia.
S.FORM: maza sisiuh a hai munapav mataidaza munapav sia pancia.
S.PHON: maða ɕiɕiux~χ a x~χai munapav mataidaða munapav ɕia panʨia.
S.TRANSL: 那個青蛙從瓶子裡跳出來了.
The frog jumped out from the bottle.

S.FORM: at cinhuza 'uvaaz a sadu tu iatu uka ungtu sisiuh sia pan.
S.PHON: at ʨinx~χuða ʔuvaað a sadu tu iatu uka uŋtu ɕiɕiux~χ ɕia pan.
S.FORM: at cinhuza 'uvaaz a sadu tu iatu uka ungtu sisiuh sia pan.
S.PHON: at ʨinx~χuða ʔuvaað a sadu tu iatu uka uŋtu ɕiɕiux~χ ɕia pan.
S.TRANSL: 然後孩子很驚訝看到為什麼青蛙沒有在瓶子裡面了.
Then he was shocked to find out why the frog was not inside the bottle anymore.

S.FORM: at mindangkaz 'uvaaz a minkailas 'uvaaz a.
S.PHON: at mindaŋkað ʔuvaað a minkail~ɬas ʔuvaað a.
S.FORM: at mindangkaz 'uvaaz a minkailas 'uvaaz a.
S.PHON: at mindaŋkað ʔuvaað a minkail~ɬas ʔuvaað a.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個孩子起床了.

TRANSL.notes: Then he got up (from the bed).

S.TRANSL: Then he got up .

S.FORM: at saduan a kucua tu ingadahcia maza sisiuha tunghabin hai uka.
S.PHON: at saduan a kuʨua tu iŋadax~χʨia maða ɕiɕiux~χa tuŋx~χabin x~χai uka.
S.FORM: at saduan a kucua tu ingadahcia maza sisiuha tunghabin hai uka.
S.PHON: at saduan a kuʨua tu iŋadax~χʨia maða ɕiɕiux~χa tuŋx~χabin x~χai uka.
S.TRANSL: 他看那個鞋子,看青蛙是否躲在裡面.沒有.
He saw the shoe, wondering whether it hid still inside. No.

S.FORM: ungat maza asuluhia hai kungadah sia pancia maza isaicia bungu kudii saak tu masikuadau sisiuha.
S.PHON: uŋat maða asul~ɬux~χia x~χai kuŋadax~χ ɕia panʨia maða isaiʨia buŋu kudii saak tu maɕikuadau ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.FORM: ungat maza asuluhia hai kungadah sia pancia maza isaicia bungu kudii saak tu masikuadau sisiuha.
S.PHON: uŋat maða asul~ɬux~χia x~χai kuŋadax~χ ɕia panʨia maða isaiʨia buŋu kudii saak tu maɕikuadau ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.TRANSL: 小狗把自己的頭放進瓶子裡,到那邊去聞青蛙到底往哪裡去.
Then the puppy put its head into the bottle,smelling to find out where the frog was going.

S.FORM: ungat kilimun naicia uka at idii naiia malala'la.
S.PHON: uŋat kil~ɬimun naiʨia uka at idii naiia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa.
S.FORM: ungat kilimun naicia uka at idii naiia malala'la.
S.PHON: uŋat kil~ɬimun naiʨia uka at idii naiia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa.
S.TRANSL: 他們尋找,但是沒有.然後他們在那邊一直叫喊.
They looked for it but find nothing. Then they were yelling all along over there.

S.FORM: at aipincin hai maza asu hai makasia siulcia muhalhal lananata.
S.PHON: at aipinʨin x~χai maða asu x~χai makaɕia ɕiul~ɬʨia mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ l~ɬananata.
S.FORM: at aipincin hai maza asu hai makasia siulcia muhalhal lananata.
S.PHON: at aipinʨin x~χai maða asu x~χai makaɕia ɕiul~ɬʨia mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ l~ɬananata.
S.TRANSL: 那個狗狗從窗戶摔下來到外面地上.
Later the dog fell out from window to the ground.

W.TRANSL: 今天=改變狀態=近距.斜格

S.FORM: at una'us 'uvaazciadau maliba tu madahpa mikua milu'lu ung ii maza pana hai panpulpul.
S.PHON: at unaʔus ʔuvaaðʨiadau mal~ɬiba tu madax~χpa mikua mil~ɬuʔl~ɬu uŋ ii maða pana x~χai panpul~ɬpul~ɬ.
S.FORM: at una'us 'uvaazciadau maliba tu madahpa mikua milu'lu ung ii maza pana hai panpulpul.
S.PHON: at unaʔus ʔuvaaðʨiadau mal~ɬiba tu madax~χpa mikua mil~ɬuʔl~ɬu uŋ ii maða pana x~χai panpul~ɬpul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 然後,因為瓶子是摔破的,那個孩子抱它,看它是否很痛,是否受傷.
#e Then the child embraced the dog, checking if it felt hurt, if it was okay or injured because of the bottle's being broken out.

S.FORM: at mudaan naiia kunata ah tupaun tu kunata sia ungtu naicia tangnata.
S.PHON: at mudaan naiia kunata ax~χ tupaun tu kunata ɕia uŋtu naiʨia taŋnata.
S.FORM: at mudaan naiia kunata ah tupaun tu kunata sia ungtu naicia tangnata.
S.PHON: at mudaan naiia kunata ax~χ tupaun tu kunata ɕia uŋtu naiʨia taŋnata.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們就走出去外面到所謂的走廊.
Then they went out to the so-called corridor.

S.FORM: at kudii naia malala'la sisiuhcia tu usabis ungtu usa kasu hai.
S.PHON: at kudii naia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa ɕiɕiux~χʨia tu usabis uŋtu usa kasu x~χai.
S.FORM: at kudii naia malala'la sisiuhcia tu usabis ungtu usa kasu hai.
S.PHON: at kudii naia mal~ɬal~ɬaʔl~ɬa ɕiɕiux~χʨia tu usabis uŋtu usa kasu x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們去一直叫青蛙說: 你去哪裡了?
Then they went over there, keeping yelling: "Hey frog, where did you go?"

S.FORM: nii naia zaav tu ungtu idii naia matahusing mala'la' hai.
S.PHON: nii naia ðaav tu uŋtu idii naia matax~χuɕiŋ mal~ɬaʔl~ɬaʔ x~χai.
S.FORM: nii naia zaav tu ungtu idii naia matahusing mala'la' hai.
S.PHON: nii naia ðaav tu uŋtu idii naia matax~χuɕiŋ mal~ɬaʔl~ɬaʔ x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 不久之後,他們就在那裡一直吵著叫喊.
Before long, they kept yelling noisily there.

S.FORM: inkaduan a naias aiza tu tasa laak lalaak.
S.PHON: inkaduan a naias aiða tu tasa l~ɬaak l~ɬal~ɬaak.
S.FORM: inkaduan a naias aiza tu tasa laak lalaak.
S.PHON: inkaduan a naias aiða tu tasa l~ɬaak l~ɬal~ɬaak.
S.TRANSL: 他們找到一個洞.
They found a hole.

S.FORM: kudii a maza 'uvaaza masivit mas laakcia aupa 'ipun saicia.
S.PHON: kudii a maða ʔuvaaða maɕivit mas l~ɬaakʨia aupa ʔipun saiʨia.
S.FORM: kudii a maza 'uvaaza masivit mas laakcia aupa 'ipun saicia.
S.PHON: kudii a maða ʔuvaaða maɕivit mas l~ɬaakʨia aupa ʔipun saiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子去那個洞那邊觀察吹氣.
The kid went there to see the hole and to blow at that hole.

S.FORM: 'ipun siacia tu ingadah maza ungtu sisiuha hai nii saia haiap tu maza mun'apav hai ingadah sia laak hai ka aluaz.
S.PHON: ʔipun ɕiaʨia tu iŋadax~χ maða uŋtu ɕiɕiux~χa x~χai nii saia x~χaiap tu maða munʔapav x~χai iŋadax~χ ɕia l~ɬaak x~χai ka al~ɬuað.
S.FORM: 'ipun siacia tu ingadah maza ungtu sisiuha hai nii saia haiap tu maza mun'apav hai ingadah sia laak hai ka aluaz.
S.PHON: ʔipun ɕiaʨia tu iŋadax~χ maða uŋtu ɕiɕiux~χa x~χai nii saia x~χaiap tu maða munʔapav x~χai iŋadax~χ ɕia l~ɬaak x~χai ka al~ɬuað.
S.TRANSL: 他吹氣,看是不是青蛙在裡面,不知道出來的就是在裡面的老鼠.
He blew to check whether the frog was in there, without knowing what came out was a mouse living inside.

S.FORM: ah tupaun zami tu aluaz.
S.PHON: ax~χ tupaun ðami tu al~ɬuað.
S.FORM: ah tupaun zami tu aluaz.
S.PHON: ax~χ tupaun ðami tu al~ɬuað.
S.TRANSL: 我們叫那個老鼠.
We call it mouse.

S.FORM: ungat maza asua hai malka'unis usaduan saia mas tupaun tu isia lukis tu aih bahusaz.
S.PHON: uŋat maða asua x~χai mal~ɬkaʔunis usaduan saia mas tupaun tu iɕia l~ɬukis tu aix~χ bax~χusað.
S.FORM: ungat maza asua hai malka'unis usaduan saia mas tupaun tu isia lukis tu aih bahusaz.
S.PHON: uŋat maða asua x~χai mal~ɬkaʔunis usaduan saia mas tupaun tu iɕia l~ɬukis tu aix~χ bax~χusað.
S.TRANSL: 他看見在樹上所謂的虎頭蜂窩.
The dog then stared at the hornets' nest.

S.FORM: idii saia lulunglung tu lulunglung tu na asa ungtu matushung.
S.PHON: idii saia l~ɬul~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ tu l~ɬul~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ tu na asa uŋtu matusx~χuŋ.
S.FORM: idii saia lulunglung tu lulunglung tu na asa ungtu matushung.
S.PHON: idii saia l~ɬul~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ tu l~ɬul~ɬuŋl~ɬuŋ tu na asa uŋtu matusx~χuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 它在那邊一直叫想要搗蛋.
It was there keeping barking and trying to prank it.

S.FORM: ai vuhvuhus asucia asua maza bahusaza hai muhalhal.
S.PHON: ai vux~χvux~χus asuʨia asua maða bax~χusaða x~χai mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ.
S.FORM: ai vuhvuhus asucia asua maza bahusaza hai muhalhal.
S.PHON: ai vux~χvux~χus asuʨia asua maða bax~χusaða x~χai mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ.

TRANSL.notes: 狗把(樹)搖動,虎頭蜂窩掉下來.

S.TRANSL: 狗把 搖動,虎頭蜂窩掉下來.

TRANSL.notes: The dog shook (the tree), and the hornets' nest dropped.

S.TRANSL: The dog shook , and the hornets' nest dropped.

S.FORM: ungat maza aluaza hai mun'apav amin.
S.PHON: uŋat maða al~ɬuaða x~χai munʔapav amin.
S.FORM: ungat maza aluaza hai mun'apav amin.
S.PHON: uŋat maða al~ɬuaða x~χai munʔapav amin.
S.TRANSL: 那個老鼠也跑出來.
The mouse also showed up.

S.FORM: ungat 'uvaaza hai kudadaza sia lukiscia mahalhal massia ungtu bahusazcia.
S.PHON: uŋat ʔuvaaða x~χai kudadaða ɕia l~ɬukisʨia max~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ masɕia uŋtu bax~χusaðʨia.
S.FORM: ungat 'uvaaza hai kudadaza sia lukiscia mahalhal massia ungtu bahusazcia.
S.PHON: uŋat ʔuvaaða x~χai kudadaða ɕia l~ɬukisʨia max~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ masɕia uŋtu bax~χusaðʨia.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個孩子爬上樹去了,弄掉那個虎頭蜂窩.
Then the kid climbed up the tree and shed the hornets' nest.

S.FORM: at isaincia mapahahainan hai.
S.PHON: at isainʨia mapax~χax~χainan x~χai.
S.FORM: at isaincia mapahahainan hai.
S.PHON: at isainʨia mapax~χax~χainan x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 他們在那裡遊戲.
They we're playing there.

S.FORM: a cinghuza adii ungtu 'uvaazan ii aupa idadaza saia sia lukiscia hai mun'apav a tupaun tusia ungtu ana tupaun tu kukuav a kukuav hai cinghuza saia at muhalhal.
S.PHON: a ʨiŋx~χuða adii uŋtu ʔuvaaðan ii aupa idadaða saia ɕia l~ɬukisʨia x~χai munʔapav a tupaun tuɕia uŋtu ana tupaun tu kukuav a kukuav x~χai ʨiŋx~χuða saia at mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ.
S.FORM: a cinghuza adii ungtu 'uvaazan ii aupa idadaza saia sia lukiscia hai mun'apav a tupaun tusia ungtu ana tupaun tu kukuav a kukuav hai cinghuza saia at muhalhal.
S.PHON: a ʨiŋx~χuða adii uŋtu ʔuvaaðan ii aupa idadaða saia ɕia l~ɬukisʨia x~χai munʔapav a tupaun tuɕia uŋtu ana tupaun tu kukuav a kukuav x~χai ʨiŋx~χuða saia at mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 孩子嚇了一跳,因為在樹上老鷹突然跑出來,所以他嚇了一跳就掉下來.
The kid shocked. He was shocked and fell down because the eagle showed up all of a sudden.

S.FORM: ungat amin a maza asu hai aupa malka'uni saia bahusazcia hai sinapun.
S.PHON: uŋat amin a maða asu x~χai aupa mal~ɬkaʔuni saia bax~χusaðʨia x~χai ɕinapun.
S.FORM: ungat amin a maza asu hai aupa malka'uni saia bahusazcia hai sinapun.
S.PHON: uŋat amin a maða asu x~χai aupa mal~ɬkaʔuni saia bax~χusaðʨia x~χai ɕinapun.

TRANSL.notes: 然後,那個狗也因為他針對著虎頭蜂而被追.Masinap: 追趕 因為狗一直對著(malkauni)虎頭蜂 所以他也被追趕

S.TRANSL: 然後,那個狗也因為他針對著虎頭蜂而被追.Masinap: 追趕 因為狗一直對著 虎頭蜂 所以他也被追趕
The dog was also chased because it played a prank on the beehive.

S.FORM: sinapus bahusazcia mazasia asua ungat maza 'uvaaza hai macisbai cisdadaan amin naia tunghabin (au)pa.
S.PHON: ɕinapus bax~χusaðʨia maðaɕia asua uŋat maða ʔuvaaða x~χai maʨisbai ʨisdadaan amin naia tuŋx~χabin (au)pa.
S.FORM: sinapus bahusazcia mazasia asua ungat maza 'uvaaza hai macisbai cisdadaan amin naia tunghabin (au)pa.
S.PHON: ɕinapus bax~χusaðʨia maðaɕia asua uŋat maða ʔuvaaða x~χai maʨisbai ʨisdadaan amin naia tuŋx~χabin (au)pa.
S.TRANSL: 那個虎頭蜂追那個狗,然後孩子也跑去躲起來了.
The dog was cased by the hornets, and the kid also ran away to hide.

S.FORM: sinapus kukuavcia tu natauhtauhun a bungua kalat.
S.PHON: ɕinapus kukuavʨia tu nataux~χtaux~χun a buŋua kal~ɬat.
S.FORM: sinapus kukuavcia tu natauhtauhun a bungua kalat.
S.PHON: ɕinapus kukuavʨia tu nataux~χtaux~χun a buŋua kal~ɬat.
S.TRANSL: 因為要被老鷹追著啄咬他的頭.
The eagle flied after him and tried to peck and bite him.

S.FORM: at kudadaza naia sia batucia tunghabin maza asu hai tunghabin amin nastu ii.
S.PHON: at kudadaða naia ɕia batuʨia tuŋx~χabin maða asu x~χai tuŋx~χabin amin nastu ii.
S.FORM: at kudadaza naia sia batucia tunghabin maza asu hai tunghabin amin nastu ii.
S.PHON: at kudadaða naia ɕia batuʨia tuŋx~χabin maða asu x~χai tuŋx~χabin amin nastu ii.
S.TRANSL: 他們爬到石頭上面,狗也躲在下面.
Then they went onto the stone, and the dog hid behind.

S.FORM: sisinapus bahusazcia nadau saia kinalat hai madahpa at idii matu'anuthul.
S.PHON: ɕiɕinapus bax~χusaðʨia nadau saia kinal~ɬat x~χai madax~χpa at idii matuʔanutx~χul~ɬ.
S.FORM: sisinapus bahusazcia nadau saia kinalat hai madahpa at idii matu'anuthul.
S.PHON: ɕiɕinapus bax~χusaðʨia nadau saia kinal~ɬat x~χai madax~χpa at idii matuʔanutx~χul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 他一直被虎頭蜂追,可能有被咬過很痛,他在那裡很無奈.
He was chased by the hornets; maybe he was bitten. He felt so depressed there.

S.FORM: at tunghabin naia sia batu sia lukis hai nii naia haiap tu maza asu hai mudadaan saia 'a'azaz' hai.
S.PHON: at tuŋx~χabin naia ɕia batu ɕia l~ɬukis x~χai nii naia x~χaiap tu maða asu x~χai mudadaan saia ʔaʔaðaðʔ x~χai.
S.FORM: at tunghabin naia sia batu sia lukis hai nii naia haiap tu maza asu hai mudadaan saia 'a'azaz' hai.
S.PHON: at tuŋx~χabin naia ɕia batu ɕia l~ɬukis x~χai nii naia x~χaiap tu maða asu x~χai mudadaan saia ʔaʔaðaðʔ x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 他們就躲在石頭, 在木頭,不知道那個狗還在跑來跑去.
He hid behind the stone and the wood, not knowing the dog was still running over.

S.FORM: masinap usaduas hanvang at tupaun tu ngabul sinapun saicia.
S.PHON: maɕinap usaduas x~χanvaŋ at tupaun tu ŋabul~ɬ ɕinapun saiʨia.
S.FORM: masinap usaduas hanvang at tupaun tu ngabul sinapun saicia.
S.PHON: maɕinap usaduas x~χanvaŋ at tupaun tu ŋabul~ɬ ɕinapun saiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 原來有一隻牛,叫做山鹿在追他.
A buffalo or a deer was running after it.

S.FORM: hai macisbai amin a hanvang at cisdadaandau ii aupa namacisbai hai nii tu haiap tu kaz maza 'uvaaza hai ka malavis asucia muhalhal mucingkul.
S.PHON: x~χai maʨisbai amin a x~χanvaŋ at ʨisdadaandau ii aupa namaʨisbai x~χai nii tu x~χaiap tu kað maða ʔuvaaða x~χai ka mal~ɬavis asuʨia mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ muʨiŋkul~ɬ.
S.FORM: hai macisbai amin a hanvang at cisdadaandau ii aupa namacisbai hai nii tu haiap tu kaz maza 'uvaaza hai ka malavis asucia muhalhal mucingkul.
S.PHON: x~χai maʨisbai amin a x~χanvaŋ at ʨisdadaandau ii aupa namaʨisbai x~χai nii tu x~χaiap tu kað maða ʔuvaaða x~χai ka mal~ɬavis asuʨia mux~χal~ɬx~χal~ɬ muʨiŋkul~ɬ.

TRANSL.notes: 那個鹿也跑掉,因為也要逃跑,不知道那個孩子和狗狗跟著它(鹿)掉下來, 跌倒.

S.TRANSL: 那個鹿也跑掉,因為也要逃跑,不知道那個孩子和狗狗跟著它 掉下來, 跌倒.
The deer rans away too. Because running away, it didn't know the kid and the dog was dropped and fell.

S.FORM: lanangadah 'uvaaza mas asucia sia danum lanangadah naia sia danum at idii a hanvang masivit naicia at.
S.PHON: l~ɬanaŋadax~χ ʔuvaaða mas asuʨia ɕia danum l~ɬanaŋadax~χ naia ɕia danum at idii a x~χanvaŋ maɕivit naiʨia at.
S.FORM: lanangadah 'uvaaza mas asucia sia danum lanangadah naia sia danum at idii a hanvang masivit naicia at.
S.PHON: l~ɬanaŋadax~χ ʔuvaaða mas asuʨia ɕia danum l~ɬanaŋadax~χ naia ɕia danum at idii a x~χanvaŋ maɕivit naiʨia at.
S.TRANSL: 狗跟孩子同時都掉進河水裡了,鹿在那裡看著他們..
The dog and the kid dropped into the water at the same time, and the deer was over there looking at them.

S.FORM: aupa lanangadah sia danum hai maza asuluhia hai ungtu ansahanus 'uvaazcia.
S.PHON: aupa l~ɬanaŋadax~χ ɕia danum x~χai maða asul~ɬux~χia x~χai uŋtu ansax~χanus ʔuvaaðʨia.
S.FORM: aupa lanangadah sia danum hai maza asuluhia hai ungtu ansahanus 'uvaazcia.
S.PHON: aupa l~ɬanaŋadax~χ ɕia danum x~χai maða asul~ɬux~χia x~χai uŋtu ansax~χanus ʔuvaaðʨia.
S.TRANSL: 因為那個小狗掉進水裡,孩子把他扛起.
Because the dog dropped into the water, it is carried by the kid.

S.FORM: a sungkat minnasia minnasisila minnasisilain naia sia itu batu lukis hai usaduan naicia tu at adiipin a sia sisiuha.
S.PHON: a suŋkat minnaɕia minnaɕiɕil~ɬa minnaɕiɕil~ɬain naia ɕia itu batu l~ɬukis x~χai usaduan naiʨia tu at adiipin a ɕia ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.FORM: a sungkat minnasia minnasisila minnasisilain naia sia itu batu lukis hai usaduan naicia tu at adiipin a sia sisiuha.
S.PHON: a suŋkat minnaɕia minnaɕiɕil~ɬa minnaɕiɕil~ɬain naia ɕia itu batu l~ɬukis x~χai usaduan naiʨia tu at adiipin a ɕia ɕiɕiux~χa.
S.TRANSL: 他們走到河邊的石頭還木頭的地方,他們看到原來是青蛙在那裡.
They walked across the river to the wood or stone, and they saw that are frogs over there.

W.TRANSL: 變成-到-重疊-邊=改變狀態
可見.遠距-那裡=改變狀態

S.FORM: undusaan amin idii islunghu.
S.PHON: undusaan amin idii isl~ɬuŋx~χu.
S.FORM: undusaan amin idii islunghu.
S.PHON: undusaan amin idii isl~ɬuŋx~χu.
S.TRANSL: 也有兩隻青蛙一起在那邊休息.
Also two frogs took a rest there.

S.FORM: pa cinnaskal naia tu inkaduananin mazasia sisiuhan at.
S.PHON: pa ʨinnaskal~ɬ naia tu inkaduananin maðaɕia ɕiɕiux~χan at.
S.FORM: pa cinnaskal naia tu inkaduananin mazasia sisiuhan at.
S.PHON: pa ʨinnaskal~ɬ naia tu inkaduananin maðaɕia ɕiɕiux~χan at.
S.TRANSL: 他們就很開心的找到這個青蛙.
They were happy because they found the frog.

S.FORM: isaincia naia mapahahainan isaincia kahuhuzas kanahtungin naia hai.
S.PHON: isainʨia naia mapax~χax~χainan isainʨia kax~χux~χuðas kanax~χtuŋin naia x~χai.
S.FORM: isaincia naia mapahahainan isaincia kahuhuzas kanahtungin naia hai.
S.PHON: isainʨia naia mapax~χax~χainan isainʨia kax~χux~χuðas kanax~χtuŋin naia x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 他們在那玩耍, 在那邊唱歌,他們結束了.
They played there, sang there, and then they finished.

S.FORM: ung hai malampukin amin inkaduananin naicia mazasia sisiuhan at.
S.PHON: uŋ x~χai mal~ɬampukin amin inkaduananin naiʨia maðaɕia ɕiɕiux~χan at.
S.FORM: ung hai malampukin amin inkaduananin naicia mazasia sisiuhan at.
S.PHON: uŋ x~χai mal~ɬampukin amin inkaduananin naiʨia maðaɕia ɕiɕiux~χan at.
S.TRANSL: 他們聚在一起了,他們找到這個青蛙了.
They got together, they found the frog.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-狀態-集合=改變狀態

S.FORM: sia tu tu sia sisiuh tu tas tu lumahancia malampuk amin sia danum sia batu sia lukis tu lalaakcia.
S.PHON: ɕia tu tu ɕia ɕiɕiux~χ tu tas tu l~ɬumax~χanʨia mal~ɬampuk amin ɕia danum ɕia batu ɕia l~ɬukis tu l~ɬal~ɬaakʨia.
S.FORM: sia tu tu sia sisiuh tu tas tu lumahancia malampuk amin sia danum sia batu sia lukis tu lalaakcia.
S.PHON: ɕia tu tu ɕia ɕiɕiux~χ tu tas tu l~ɬumax~χanʨia mal~ɬampuk amin ɕia danum ɕia batu ɕia l~ɬukis tu l~ɬal~ɬaakʨia.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙的一家人也聚集在水裡、在石頭或樹洞裡面.
The frog family also got together around the water, the stone, or the tree holes.

S.FORM: idii naia amin a malampuk at 'uvaaz hai kanahtung naia tu inkaduananin at.
S.PHON: idii naia amin a mal~ɬampuk at ʔuvaað x~χai kanax~χtuŋ naia tu inkaduananin at.
S.FORM: idii naia amin a malampuk at 'uvaaz hai kanahtung naia tu inkaduananin at.
S.PHON: idii naia amin a mal~ɬampuk at ʔuvaað x~χai kanax~χtuŋ naia tu inkaduananin at.
S.TRANSL: 大家都在那邊集中一起,那孩子結束了他的尋找.

TRANSL.notes: Everyone is there together, and the kid finished looking for (the frog).

S.TRANSL: Everyone is there together, and the kid finished looking for .

S.FORM: amin a 'uvaaza hai asu hai dasun amin saicia.
S.PHON: amin a ʔuvaaða x~χai asu x~χai dasun amin saiʨia.
S.FORM: amin a 'uvaaza hai asu hai dasun amin saicia.
S.PHON: amin a ʔuvaaða x~χai asu x~χai dasun amin saiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 那孩子也把狗帶走了.
The kid brought over his dog.

S.FORM: madas saia tu tasa mas nautu saipukun saicia tu maza sia sisiuh mapisia lumah suhaisun saicia mapisia pan.
S.PHON: madas saia tu tasa mas nautu saipukun saiʨia tu maða ɕia ɕiɕiux~χ mapiɕia l~ɬumax~χ sux~χaisun saiʨia mapiɕia pan.
S.FORM: madas saia tu tasa mas nautu saipukun saicia tu maza sia sisiuh mapisia lumah suhaisun saicia mapisia pan.
S.PHON: madas saia tu tasa mas nautu saipukun saiʨia tu maða ɕia ɕiɕiux~χ mapiɕia l~ɬumax~χ sux~χaisun saiʨia mapiɕia pan.
S.TRANSL: 他把他本來養的那隻青蛙帶回家,放回到瓶子裡.
He brought the frog he had kept back to the home and put it into the bottle.
